title: Peppery Indian Date Crumble
description: A midnight-craving chewy dish with a peppery twist and low-fat-friendly option using caster sugar, blanching process for dates.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Blanch dates in boiling water for about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and let them cool slightly. Drain well.
In a mixing bowl, combine sugar, flour, cinnamon powder, and nutmeg powder.
Add cooled dates into the mixture and stir until evenly coated.
Press the date mixture firmly onto an ungreased baking dish or tray lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow to cool before serving. Serve warm as a dessert.
